name: Datadog
philosophy: Institutional observability brand with personality — purple-on-white with a serif display, anchored by the Bark dog-mascot illustration system.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature mascot blink/wag micro-animation and slow chart-line draw-on in dashboard mockups.

trademark_signals: Bark the dog mascot appears in nearly every hero band — the only literal mascot surviving in dev-observability
Purple with a single bark-orange accent — no other secondary on marketing
Serif display headlines in an industry of geometric sans — the brand differentiator
Five-tier pricing tables signaling enterprise depth
Dashboard mockups carry real product chrome, never abstract data viz
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add a second mascot — Bark stands alone
Don't switch to geometric-sans display — the serif is the brand voice
Don't use saturated rainbow data viz in screenshots
